name: Granary
note: Requires Farming. Stores grain so the settlement eats through a bad week.

name: Cellar
note: Requires Pantry. A cool root cellar — first-round food for a settlement that hasn't broken ground on a Granary yet.

name: Smokehouse
note: Requires Cooking. Cured meat keeps spirits up through winter.

name: Trading Post
note: Requires Bartering. A roadside stall with a post and a horn — first taste of trade revenue.

name: Hunter's Lodge
note: Requires Foraging. Game and pelts in equal measure.

name: Apiary
note: Requires bee keeping. Bees provide more than honey.

name: Barracks
note: Requires Stick fighting. Drill ground and a roof for the spears.

name: Library
note: Requires Library (tech) + Reading. Shelf, ledger, lamp.

name: Walls
note: Requires Walls (tech) + masonry. Soldiers stationed inside cost less to feed.

name: Mill
note: Requires mill + Farming. Grinds grain and saws lumber off the same wheel.

name: Tavern
note: Requires beer brewing. Cheap drink, loud songs, fewer fights at dawn.

name: Watchtower
note: Requires Town Watch. Visible safety calms the settlement.

name: Public Bath
note: Requires Plumbing. Steam, gossip, clean people.

name: Smithy
note: Requires Blacksmithing. Edges sharper, plates thicker.

name: Apothecary
note: Requires Chemistry. Tinctures the priests would frown at.

name: Brewery
note: Requires beer brewing + Cooking. Beer pays in coin and good cheer.

name: Pottery
note: Requires Ceramics. Pots for storage, jugs for sale.

name: Looms
note: Requires loom. Cloth into clothes, looms into cloth.

name: Fight Circle
note: Requires Stick fighting. A pit, a rope, and a payday for the bare-knuckle champ.

name: Stables
note: Requires Horseback riding. Mounts ready when Foreign needs them.

name: Quarry Camp
note: Requires mining. Stone hauled out daily.

name: Recycling Yard
note: Requires Recycling + Salvage. One person's scrap is another's chassis.

name: Forge
note: Requires metalworking + Smelting. Hammer, anvil, billet — the soldiers thank the forgemen.

name: Market
note: Requires Markets. The day the merchants open is the day the streets fill.

name: Mint
note: Requires Currency. Stamps a coin you can trust farther than the next valley.

name: Workshop
note: Requires Apprenticeship. Tools beget tools.

name: Print Shop
note: Requires Printing. Pamphlets, ledgers, broadsheets.

name: Customs House
note: Requires Tariffs. Toll keepers with neat ledgers.

name: Trade Caravan
note: Requires Trade Routes. On the road three weeks of every four.

name: Glassworks
note: Requires Glassblowing. Lenses and bottles, both in demand.

name: Drill Yard
note: Requires Tactics. Daily drills with practice spears.

name: Theater
note: Requires Theater (tech). Players, plays, and unstable poets.

name: Engineering Guild
note: Requires Engineering. They calculate the load before they pour the foundation.

name: Counting House
note: Requires Banking. Ledgers thick enough to stop a knife.

name: Armory
note: Requires Armor + Blacksmithing. Racks of plate and shield.

name: Cathedral
note: Requires Religion + masonry. Stained glass, taller than memory.

name: Garrison
note: Requires Logistics. Beds, mess, drill — all under one roof.

name: Hospital Annex
benefit: 1 food and decrease unit maintenance by 1
note: Requires Medicine. Convalescent rooms double as soldier billets.

name: Generator Shed
note: Requires Generators + Fix electronics. First electric lights in the settlement.

name: Bank
note: Requires Banking + Currency. Where the loans live and the ledgers sleep.

name: Tower
note: Requires Walls (tech) + masonry. Tall enough to see the whole valley.

name: Aqueduct
note: Requires Plumbing + Bridges. Clean water at every fountain.

name: Ironworks
note: Requires Smelting + metalworking. Bigger billets, bigger blades.

name: Temple
note: Requires Religion. Old gods, new theories.

name: Windmill
note: Requires mill + Engineering. Wind on the high field; sails and gears below.

name: Master Smith
note: Requires Plate Armor + Blacksmithing. Exquisite, rare work.

name: Engineering College
note: Requires Engineering Theory + School. Teach, then build it.

name: School
note: Requires School (tech) + Library + Pedagogy. Where the next generation overtakes the last.

name: Solar Array
note: Requires Solar panels + Power Grid. Panels squint at the dust.

name: Grand Bazaar
note: Requires Markets + Tariffs. Every booth selling something different.

name: Citadel
benefit: +3 defense and decrease unit maintenance by 3
note: Requires Walls (tech) + Engineering. Headquarters on a hill.

name: Factory
note: Requires Factory working + Power Grid. The line runs three shifts a day.

name: Hospital
note: Requires Public Health + Refrigeration. Wings on wings of cots and clean linens.

name: Palace
note: Requires Leadership + Architecture. The chief's actual house.

name: Arsenal
note: Requires Heavy Weapons + Bullet manufacturing. Every shelf a weapon, every rack a row.

name: Power Plant
note: Requires Electricity + Power Grid. Hum and heat keep the lights on.

name: Grand Theater
note: Requires Theater (tech) + Architecture. Sold out, every season.

name: Fortress
benefit: +5 defense and decrease unit maintenance by 3
note: Requires Walls (tech) + Plate Armor. A keep thick enough to last a siege.
